mentions.note: First sustained down move in stock; needs more work and possibly field trip before calling a winner or loser.

Down 35% from $141 highs; now 20x P/E (cheapest ever) vs 37x at peak; execution miss vs peers (3.6% same-store sales vs TJX 5%); strong balance sheet, 1,300 store goal, mid-teens earnings growth target; start small, buy on weakness.

Discount retailer missing quarters consistently; weak execution. Caller Will bought at 94, 88, now 70; stock broke down. TJX owns the segment and executes better; stick with TJX instead (though even TJX struggling).
